serviceName: Amazon RDS Custom for SQL Server
serviceDescription: Amazon Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS) Custom is a managed database service for legacy, custom, and packaged applications that require access to the underlying OS and DB environment. Amazon RDS Custom automates setup, operation, and scaling of databases in the cloud while granting access to the database and underlying operating system to configure settings, install patches, and enable native features to meet the dependent application's requirements.

cards.title: Select RDS Custom for SQL Server instances

row.label: Number of RDS Custom for SQL Server instances
Utilization (On-Demand only)
row.description: With utilization, you still have to stop the instance to get the cost benefit. Utilization only affects OnDemand pricing for instances and not the storage, backups, etc.

components.label: RDS Custom for SQL Server cost

cards.title: Storage
cards.description: Enter the amount of storage you'd like for each instance.
cards.helpText: Amazon RDS Custom provides you the ability to select from 20 GiB to 16 TiB of associated General Purpose (SSD) storage capacity for your primary data set. With General Purpose (SSD), you will be charged for storage you provision. However, you will not be charged for the I/Os you consume. Amazon RDS Custom provides you the ability to provision the I/O capacity your database needs. You can provision and scale from 1,000 IOPS to 64,000 IOPS and 20 GiB to 16 TiB of storage. Note that maximum realized IOPS will vary by database workload. With Provisioned IOPS SSD storage, you will be charged for the IOPS and storage you provision.

components.label: Storage for each RDS Custom for SQL Server instance

components.content: For GP3 Storage volumes, all IOPS and throughput use below the baseline is included at no additional charge. For volumes below 200 GiB of allocated storage, the baseline provisioned IOPS is 3,000 and baseline throughput is 125 MiBps. Volumes of 200 GiB and above, baseline provisioned IOPS is 12,000 and baseline throughput is 500 MiBps. There is an additional charge for provisioned IOPS and throughput above baseline.

components.apiDescription: Required only if the storageType is Provisioned IOPS.
components.label: Provisioning IOPS
General Purpose SSD (gp3) - IOPS
components.apiDescription: Required only if the storageType is General Purpose SSD (gp3)
components.placeholder: Enter amount of IOPS per volume
components.description: gp3 supports a max of 64,000 IOPS per volume

components.label: General Purpose SSD (gp3) - Throughput
components.description: gp3 supports a max of 4000 MiBps per volume

components.header: Invalid IOPS to Provisioned Throughput ratio
components.label: info alert

content.aws: This calculator does not enforce the IOPS to GB or IOPS to Provisioned Throughput ratios for gp3. The maximum ratio of provisioned IOPS to provisioned volume size is 500 IOPS per GiB. The maximum ratio of provisioned throughput to provisioned IOPS is .25 MiBs per IOPS. For more information, see the General Purpose (gp3). For more information, see the General Purpose (gp3) user guide.
content.aws-cn: This calculator does not enforce the IOPS to GB or IOPS to Provisioned Throughput ratios for gp3. The maximum ratio of provisioned IOPS to provisioned volume size is 500 IOPS per GiB. The maximum ratio of provisioned throughput to provisioned IOPS is .25 MiBs per IOPS. For more information, see the General Purpose (gp3). For more information, see the General Purpose (gp3) user guide.

cards.title: Backup Storage
cards.helpText: Backup storage for Amazon RDS Custom is the storage associated with your automated database backups and any customer-initiated DB snapshots. There is no additional charge for backup storage of up to 100% of your total database storage in in the destination region.
